translated: How should I put it...
The MV, I mean?
I hope you'll enjoy the MV along with the song.
Looking back, Niigo stories have often been quite heavy or felt a bit suffocating,
but I think this one is a story that high schoolers,
from first to third years, can really relate to on a personal level.
Things like deciding on your future path,
or struggling to accept and love the things you like...
That's not just for students, but for adults as well.
If you haven't seen the story or heard the song yet,
there might be words that resonate with you exactly because of where you are in life right now.
I hope everyone, students and adults alike, enjoys it to the very end.
So, if you haven't finished the story for "Reaching Out to an Unraveling Tomorrow" yet,
you can still read the whole thing even after the next event starts.
Please give it a read.
It'll also be uploaded to YouTube eventually,
so it's perfectly fine to wait for that too.
We're always looking for messages for AfterTalk.
You can send them via the ProSeka official Discord channel or by email.
Please send them in once the next AfterTalk event begins.
We're looking for messages related to the event.
August is almost over, and once September passes,
the Anniversary Festival will be waiting for us.
We're busy getting ready for it, so please look forward to that too.
August is ending, but the heat isn't going anywhere.
Please be careful of heatstroke. If you feel like it's too much,
it's okay to just run away from the heat.
Staying cool is the most important thing.
Let's all make it to the Anniversary Festival.
We'll be waiting for you at the venue and on the stream.
Thank you all for watching until the end.
Let's survive the summer together! See you again soon.
Bye-bye!
